message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #E9E9FF
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor #E9E9FF
  BorderColor #000000
  FontSize 26
}
skinparam box {
  BackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  BorderColor #000000
  FontSize 30
  FontStyle bold
}

actor "Customer" as C

box "Shopware Platform" #DDDDDD
  participant "Checkout" as CO
  participant "Asynchronous\nPayment Handler" as APH
end box

box "External System" #DDDDDD
  actor "Payment Platform" as PP
end box

C -[#000000,dashed,thickness=2]> CO : pay
CO -[#000000,dashed,thickness=2]> APH : pay
APH -[#000000,dashed,thickness=2]> C : redirect
C -[#000000,dashed,thickness=2]> PP : pay
PP -[#000000,dashed,thickness=2]> CO : redirect
CO -[#000000,dashed,thickness=2]> APH : finalize

@enduml
